clickstack.title: Upstream ClickStack pass-through
clickstack.description: Values forwarded verbatim to the upstream ClickStack 3.0.0 subchart (ClickHouse/Keeper/OTel/HyperDX/MongoDB). Free-form; validated by the upstream chart.

type.description: How the HyperDX service is exposed (maps to clickstack.hyperdx.service.type).

hyperdxHost.description: External host/IP used to build HyperDX app URLs (FRONTEND_URL/NEXTAUTH_URL). Empty keeps upstream defaults.

krateo.description: Krateo namespace (consumers of the credentials/endpoint secrets).

storageClassName.title: Default StorageClass
storageClassName.description: StorageClass threaded into each CRD's dataVolumeClaimSpec.storageClassName. Empty uses the cluster default.
